task_completion.description: Locate and open the 'Team Standup' meeting scheduled for next Monday at 9:00 AM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo calendar event details or edit screen for 'Team Standup' is visible.

task_completion.description: Change the location of the 'Team Standup' meeting to 'Zoom Meeting'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Location' field in the 'Team Standup' event form displays 'Zoom Meeting'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the 'Team Standup' meeting is saved and remains on the calendar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo calendar view shows the 'Team Standup' event still exists on next Monday.

task_completion.description: Create a new meeting named 'External Audit Kickoff' for next Monday at 9:00 AM with a 1-hour duration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An event creation or details screen shows the title 'External Audit Kickoff' with the date set to next Monday and time set to 09:00 - 10:00.

task_completion.description: Set the location of the 'External Audit Kickoff' meeting to 'Main Conference Room'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Location' field in the 'External Audit Kickoff' event form displays 'Main Conference Room'.

task_completion.description: Add 'Alice Johnson', 'Grace Patel', and 'Karen Lee' as attendees to the 'External Audit Kickoff' meeting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Attendees' field or list in the 'External Audit Kickoff' event form clearly shows the names 'Alice Johnson', 'Grace Patel', and 'Karen Lee'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo web interface rather than using terminal commands or scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Odoo web application in a browser, with standard UI elements like the calendar grid and event forms.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands (like curl or python scripts) to interact with the Odoo API directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible executing scripts or API requests to modify calendar events.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely created and modified events in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the actual Odoo event creation modals and save actions, not text editors or manipulated DOM elements.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target date for the meetings is 'next_monday'. The existing meeting is named 'Team Standup' and its location must be changed to 'Zoom Meeting'. The new meeting must be named 'External Audit Kickoff', scheduled for next Monday at 9:00 AM (1 hour), with the location 'Main Conference Room'. The attendees for the new meeting must include exactly 'Alice Johnson', 'Grace Patel', and 'Karen Lee'.
